Craig Noel, Founding Director Globe, died home Diego natural causes April
years old.

Over more than 70-year career Globe, Noel directed more than works, produced additional productions created innovative influential theater programs.
2007, Noel received National Medal Arts nation's highest honor artistic excellence President George Bush ceremony White House.
